prose:
The frontier molecular orbital energies of ethylene were calculated using Density Functional Theory (DFT) at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (chemkit's tier 'standard'). The calculation was performed in the gas phase on the user-provided geometry, assuming a neutral charge (0) and singlet multiplicity (1). The calculation was performed with the PySCF program and the SCF procedure converged successfully. No warnings were reported.

The resulting energies are:
HOMO: -7.6156 eV
LUMO: -0.17987 eV
HOMO-LUMO Gap: 7.4357 eV
